item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
yeah so that is genius
bastards
order pizza whenever you want, uncle cel sez so
not sure if that's a python. maybe a ball python?
mmm hmm
aka my hero
i like how this is mostly from 1.. well, sort of
far out
torus definition. can't stand it!!!!
finally
everything is so off
not cool
stupid laundry.
we've all been there
i'm sure the scientists of Imgur will be here soon to confirm this
and balls
that's that. have a great night gang!!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.dc:creator: DaemonReaper

item.title: I'm so sick of this shit.
item.dc:creator: ChaoticEnigma1121

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1147 (magical dimetrodon)
item.description:
Ugh. It is morning. I am awake. I was having a lovely dream where I was watching an epic, imax-filmed, lovingly animated version of Terry Pratchett's "The Last Hero." Anyways. Bread. Let's get it.
Bird. But yeah, same gremlin energy.
Hey look, it's another Meme that attacks @sisipherr mercilessly. But also this is a mood for me, too. Fuck you, Tamarisk. Fuck you, Bermuda grass.
At least no more oracle bone turtles.
Mood.
I actually think I know who this priest is; I think I went to seminary with this dude. Well, insofar as I can recognize someone by their head.
Accurate. Today's album is Roots and Sprouts, again.
I discovered a new fruit at the store Saturday night: Cherimoya. So I splurged and bought some.
I liked the flavor, but wasn't crazy about the texture, so I was trying to figure out what to do with the other ones I bought. I discovered that some botanist by the name of Berthold Seemann described it as one of the three most sublime fruits in the world, alongside Pineapples and Mangosteen. So now I have to do the obvious and make a mead with all three and call it "Seemann's Elixir" just for the joke. Ordered some Mangosteen juice and dried Mangosteen fruit and picked up some pineapple. Haven't decided what honey to use yet, though. Prepped the pineapple and the rest of the Cherimoya and threw everything in the freezer.
Proper "Viking" helmet styles. Or Anglo-saxon ones.
And trying to remember what grammar goes where is frustrating me to try new languages in great depth
When my buddy Gary and I were down in SE AZ and trapped this is always how we greeted each other.
Oops.
Me on Monday.
(I actually learned a lot from my foray into Buddhism. I just found the idea of Ron Swanson as Orthodox to be absolutely hilarious for some reason.)
Yeah, but how long did your empires last? Yeah, I thought so.
Poor Allosaurus.
Come on, Ireland, make Star Trek real.
Any of the four hadrosaurs from deposits in Baja California.
You heard me, Ireland. Unify. Make star trek real.
the Sauropod Camelotia on a quest
Penguins are true aquatic dinosaurs.
That last one hits hardest.
Mood.
@DataDewDrop and I had a midnight conversation about Synapsids vs. Diapsids and this lead, to a madcap scenario where Diogenes of Sinope brings a Dimetrodon into Plato's Academy and proclaims, "Look, a mammal..." which then subsequently changes the face of Philosophy forever when it promptly eats Aristotle. To the point where Mohammad flies on two magical embracing Dimetrodons in his Night Ride from Jerusalem. ...which THEN lead to me saying "it's a magical Dimetrodon, Charlie." And so @DataDewDrop made this meme. I was sober at the time too, just very sleep-deprived. Imagine me sleep-deprived and on Alcohol.
It really does.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Hi Pippin! He's a pretty boy. Okay."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: "Every year this mama duck brings her babies to my house and I help her take care of them. This morning I opened my door to 13 new peeping fluff balls."
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: SecretHarpy's Meme Library: Volume 19
item.description:
Hello and welcome to yet another meme dump, my imgur friends. I am tired and all out of witty remarks for this one, so...onward, to memes!
Not CILANTRO MODE! I really, really hate cilantro.
Accurate and it's awful. Everything took forever as a child and now I blink and I've aged another 5 years. MAKE IT STOP
Morning people were given too much power
Just hold up I really do wanna see this lizard it looks neato HELLO LIL' LIZARD FRIEND
...yeah
Passed out drunk in a corn field somewhere, not a cell phone in sight
sus
And I love it
My dad's dead and I lost my chance to fight him. So my advice is to go fight your dad before it's too late to do so. Godspeed,
And that's all for this volume folks. Stay awesome imgur.
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: I hand-stitched this
item.description: Edit: Wow, most viral! Thanks for the love; I didn't expect this! Just in case, this and other creations are available here in my shop: https://rebordacaoembroidery.etsy.com Best wishes everyone!
item.dc:creator: rebordacao

item.title: I made a cardigan!
item.description: I bought the yarn back in 2018, made a jumper I hated, ripped it out, started this cardigan… and then abandoned it for 3 years. Feels great to have finally finished it! #handmade #knitting
item.dc:creator: Ammety

item.title: This, this all day long!!!
item.description: I grew up in a house where I was resented because they were only together for me... Trust me... It's ok to break up, don't stay together for the kids, it doesn't work!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: I literally just seemed the buttons on this new cardigan I knit. It's a little late in the year for a wool sweater but it'll be there for me on cold mornings.
item.description:
This is 100% wool so it is a little itchy but nothing I can't handle and I wanted an all natural fiber to try. We'll see how it goes.
Hope any knitter's out there enjoy.
Please enjoy a pic of my dad's new cat.
item.dc:creator: abbycrochetnerd
